_comment: CloudWatch agent config for the search-ranking instance. Install the agent (sudo apt-get install -y amazon-cloudwatch-agent OR the .deb from S3), place this at /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc/amazon-cloudwatch-agent.json, then: sudo amazon-cloudwatch-agent-ctl -a fetch-config -m ec2 -c file:/opt/.../amazon-cloudwatch-agent.json -s . Requires the instance role to allow cloudwatch:PutMetricData and logs:CreateLogStream/PutLogEvents.
